title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at FM Logistic India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at FM Logistic India
jsonLd.description:
FM Logistic India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FM Logistic India:
FM Logistic India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FM Logistic India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
